nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 绿带尾蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 绿带尾蜂鸟（Green-tailed trainbearer，学名 Lesbia nuna），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 委內瑞拉

The green-tailed trainbearer mostly inhabits secondary woodland and brushy slopes but also occurs in Polylepis woodland and páramo

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: However, deforestation of Polylepis woodlands, ranching, and farming are all potential threats
